profile.name: Muhammad Umair Raza
profile.summary: Aerospace and defense professional with 16+ years of experience spanning avionics systems engineering, program management, field operations, and academic quality assurance across Pakistan Air Force postings, international deputations, and university secondments. Deep expertise in fighter aircraft programs (JF-17 Thunder, SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C), weapons systems (Crotale SHORAD), and cross-cultural engineering collaboration (China/CADI). Combines hands-on technical depth with senior program leadership and academic instruction in systems engineering.
profile.employer_note: All roles are PAF postings, secondments, or deputations. China was a deputation.

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed and integrated avionics subsystems for military aircraft platforms at PAC Kamra
Performed system-level testing, verification, and validation of integrated avionics suites
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on aircraft modification and upgrade programs
Developed technical documentation for design reviews, configuration baselines, and test procedures
Supported production line engineering for avionics installation and wiring harness integration

experience.title: MS Avionics Engineering
bullets: Master of Science in Avionics Engineering
Research focus on aerospace systems and avionics architecture

experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed maintenance engineering for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet (9 aircraft) including radar, mission systems, and airframe
Ensured operational readiness through maintenance scheduling, staggering, and resource allocation
Performed technical fault diagnosis and coordinated component repair/replacement activities
Led maintenance teams for field operations, ensuring aircraft availability for surveillance missions
Managed maintenance documentation, compliance tracking, and airworthiness reporting

experience.title: Aerospace Systems Integration Lead
bullets: Led avionics and weapons systems integration for JF-17 Thunder Block III development at CADI
Coordinated between PAF operational requirements and Chinese engineering teams on system design
Managed integration testing of indigenous mission computer, EW suite, and glass cockpit systems
Supported flight test campaigns for weapons integration and avionics qualification
Bridged cross-cultural engineering collaboration between Pakistani and Chinese technical teams
Contributed to the development of JF-17's indigenous systems replacing legacy Chinese/Russian components

experience.title: Assistant Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Coordinated program activities between CADI (JF-17 OEM designer), PAF manufacturing facilities (PAC Kamra), and field squadrons
Tracked milestones across avionics integration, weapons systems qualification, and airframe production
Managed configuration control for indigenous systems including mission computer, EW suite, and AESA radar integration
Oversaw budget tracking, contractor deliverables, and schedule risk management
Facilitated weapons testing coordination with operational field squadrons

experience.title: Senior Engineering Officer, Crotale Weapons System
bullets: Commanded engineering operations for Crotale short-range air defense weapons system protecting airfield assets
Managed operational readiness of SAM battery including launcher, radar, fire control, and missile systems
Led field maintenance teams responsible for weapons system availability during operational deployments
Coordinated maintenance staggering and resource allocation across multiple system components
Supervised personnel management including training, duty rosters, and competency development
Maintained weapons inventory management and ammunition accountability

experience.title: Deputy Director, Program Management Office — JF-17 Aircraft
bullets: Senior program management role overseeing JF-17 production lots, modification programs, and export coordination
Led program reviews, managed engineering change proposals, and resource allocation across work packages
Coordinated flight test campaigns, weapons integration trials, and certification activities
Managed export variant coordination for international customers (Myanmar, Nigeria, and others)
Elevated from Assistant Director after field rotation, bringing operational perspective to program decisions

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed program activities for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment (9 aircraft)
Coordinated maintenance contracts, spare parts logistics, and system upgrade programs
Liaised with SAAB (Sweden) for technical support, modifications, and obsolescence management
Tracked fleet availability metrics and mission readiness reporting

experience.title: Assistant Director Quality Academics
bullets: Headed university Quality Assurance department overseeing academic standards and processes
Managed PEC (Pakistan Engineering Council) and HEC (Higher Education Commission) accreditation compliance
Implemented OBE (Outcome-Based Education) frameworks including CLO/PLO mapping and assessment rubric design
Led continuous quality improvement (CQI) cycles and institutional performance metrics
Conducted faculty development evaluations, teaching quality assessments, and training needs identification
Oversaw examination moderation, grade distribution analysis, and academic integrity processes
Taught Systems Engineering as adjunct faculty alongside QA duties

experience.title: Projects Officer, Research Coordinator & Faculty — Systems Engineering
bullets: Coordinates faculty and student research projects, funding proposals, and publications tracking
Manages capstone/FYP supervision and industry-academia linkages
Oversees lab development and project resource allocation
Teaches Systems Engineering courses to aeronautical engineering students
Facilitates research collaboration and knowledge transfer initiatives

certifications.name: Introduction to Systems Engineering Specialization
certifications.issuer: University of Colorado Boulder / Lockheed Martin (via Coursera)

certifications.name: Leading Teams: Building Effective Team Cultures
Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)

career_pattern.transition_context: Active service member exploring civilian career options
